# Recap Studio

> Claude Code plugin: turn any topic or git diff into a cited, mobile-first, dark-mode one-page explainer in under 5 minutes.

## Install

### Marketplace (recommended)
```
claude plugin install recap-studio@10x
```

### CLI (any terminal, no Claude Code required)
The `@recap-studio/cli` npm package is NOT yet published. Today, run it from a
built clone:
```
node packages/cli/dist/index.js render content.json -o out.html
node packages/cli/dist/index.js validate content.json
# Planned (not yet on npm): npx @recap-studio/cli render content.json -o out.html
```

## Key files / packages

- `README.md`: overview, install, commands, quality bar
- `skills/`: `recap-topic`, `recap-session`, `recap-setup`, `recap-validate` (Claude Code skill orchestrators)
- `packages/html-renderer/` (`@recap-studio/html-renderer`): `renderToHtml(content, {theme})` -> one self-contained dark-mode HTML string; all CSS inlined, zero JavaScript, opens offline via `file://`
- `packages/cli/` (`@recap-studio/cli`): `recap render` / `recap validate` commands; works in any editor or terminal
- `packages/mcp-server/` (`@recap-studio/mcp-server`): MCP server exposing `render_recap_html` tool; compatible with Cursor, VS Code, Codex, Continue
- `packages/content-pipeline/` (`@recap-studio/content-pipeline`): schema definitions, content loader, subpath `@recap-studio/content-pipeline/load-config` for safe imports
- `packages/validation/`: deterministic heuristic scorer (see IMPORTANT note below)
- `agents/`: 13 specialist agent prompt files (fact-checker, structure-reviewer, citation-validator, etc.); invoked at skill runtime, not during static validation

## IMPORTANT: validation scores

Scores produced by `pnpm validate:demo` (and displayed as "9.7 / 10") are **deterministic heuristics** (word counts, sourceId presence, secret-pattern regex) executed by `scripts/validate.mjs` in Node.js.

- They do **not** involve LLM calls.
- They do **not** fetch or verify cited sources.
- LLM agent reviews (the 13 specialist agents) run at **skill invocation time** inside Claude Code, not during static demo validation.

Any mention of "7 reviewers in parallel" refers to 7 heuristic dimensions running concurrently, not 7 concurrent LLM agents during `pnpm validate:demo`.

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/Aboudjem/recap-studio
- npm (plugin): https://www.npmjs.com/package/recap-studio (placeholder; canonical install is via 10x marketplace)
- npm (CLI): @recap-studio/cli (planned; not yet published)
- npm (html-renderer): @recap-studio/html-renderer (planned; not yet published)

- Author: Adam Boudjemaa (https://github.com/Aboudjem)
